channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: California walloped by winter storm with high winds and heavy rain and snow
item.description: California is being walloped by a powerful winter storm carrying thunderstorms, strong winds and heavy snow in the mountains

item.title: New Orleans celebrates Mardi Gras, the indulgent conclusion of Carnival season
item.description: As the sun rose in New Orleans, rows of parade-goers already lined the street

item.title: Crews search for backcountry skiers after avalanche reported in California mountains
item.description: Authorities say six backcountry skiers are alive and 10 others are missing after an avalanche in Northern California that occurred during a powerful w...

item.title: Ramadan ushers in month of fasting, worship and charity for Muslims: Photos
item.description: Muslims worldwide will begin daily fasting from dawn to sunset as Ramadan starts, marking a period of worship, reflection and charity. The holy month,...

item.title: Winning numbers drawn in Tuesday’s Mega Millions
item.description: The winning numbers in Tuesday evening’s drawing of the "Mega Millions" game were: 03-37-44-52-63, Mega Ball: 14, Megaplier:
